# AC-03: AI Component Design Review

**Track:** AI Controls (`AC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

For changes involving AI systems: validate model selection rationale, data pipeline design, data governance approach, explainability mechanisms, and human oversight provisions. Ensures AI component design meets EU AI Act technical documentation requirements before implementation begins. Not applicable to changes with no AI component.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 2 | System Design | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent assists, human approves |
| **Agent does** | Validate AI component design against AI Act requirements; identify gaps in explainability, data governance, or human oversight provisions. |
| **Human does** | Review AI design validation; approve or require revisions before implementation proceeds. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| AI Act risk tier classification | AC-01 | Risk tier from Stage 1 determining which AI Act obligations apply. |
| Approved architecture document | QC-03 | Architecture design including AI component specifications. |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| AI component design review report | evidence | Validated documentation covering model selection, data governance, explainability, and human oversight. | 7 years (AI Act) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | AI Governance Lead |

Gaps in AI design documentation block progression. Design must be revised to address all AI Act requirements.

## Dependencies

- `QC-03`
- `AC-01`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| EU AI Act | Art. 11, Annex IV | Technical documentation requirements for high-risk AI systems |
| EU AI Act | Art. 13 | Transparency and information provision for AI systems |
| EU AI Act | Art. 14 | Human oversight mechanisms must be designed into the system |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** AI Governance · **Owner role:** AI Governance Lead
